page_metadata.biotools__summary: A resource of gene and protein expression in NGLY1 deficient patient-derived cell lines. Currently the dataset comprises bulk gene and protein expression data dervied from 31 donors (14 NGLY1-deficient children, 17 parent controls) representing 4 different cell types.
